name: MiniStore Nightly Updates
subtitle: MiniStore nightly self-update source
description: Nightly update source for MiniStore — the alternative App Store for iOS.

apps.name: MiniStore
apps.subtitle: The Alternative App Store
apps.localizedDescription:
MiniStore is an alternative App Store for iOS that lets you install and update apps directly from your device — no computer required.

Features:
• Install apps directly from sources
• Refresh and update apps wirelessly
• Widget support to track app expiry
• Browse curated sources and discover new apps

permissions.usageDescription: Required to communicate with your device over Wi-Fi to install and refresh apps.
Allows MiniStore to check for app updates in the background.

releases.localizedDescription: Latest nightly build — may contain experimental features and bugs. Use at your own risk.
